1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: select quick-clay high-risk polygons (filtered by discovered class value)

4.description: get parcels in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

5.description: find parcels that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

9.description: get county polygons to identify county for Trondheim

10.description: find county containing the Trondheim municipality (for county name)

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';
